# Setnayan

> Setnayan (SET-na-yan, from Tagalog "Set na 'yan." — "that's all set") is the Philippines-first wedding and life-events software platform. V1 surface is weddings. Architecture extends to birthdays, celebrations, travel, corporate, tournament, and christening events as those iterations ship. Built and operated entirely in the Philippines. Beyond standard planning tools, Setnayan's signature is its day-of capture and media layer — Papic (guests' phones become a coordinated photo-and-video crew, with auto-tagged galleries and per-guest personal highlight reels), Panood livestream on the event page, the Setnayan AI planner, and a custom Pakanta wedding song. Free planning workspace for couples; 0% commission on vendor bookings; transparent PHP pricing on premium software services and planning tiers.

## What Setnayan does

Setnayan is software, not an agency. Couples start free with the planning workspace (schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board) and a preview of their vendor matches, then optionally add Setnayan AI (₱3,999 one-time per event) — the full vendor-matchmaking and guided-planning layer — and any of the in-app paid services (live streaming, photo capture, custom songwriting, monogram design, wedding website). Verified Filipino wedding vendors list their services and receive bookings with zero platform commission. Couples and vendors transact directly outside the platform for bookings.

## Currently shipped public surfaces

- [Setnayan Home](https://www.setnayan.com/) — Wedding planning platform overview, transparent PHP pricing, 0% commission claim, Filipino vendor stories.
- [Wedding Vendor Directory](https://www.setnayan.com/vendors) — Browse verified Filipino wedding vendors. Filterable by category (photography, catering, planning, florals, attire, hair and makeup, music, decor, rings, booths, invitations) and city.
- [Vendor Public Profiles](https://www.setnayan.com/v/) — Each vendor has a profile at `/v/[slug]` with services, packages, coverage cities, and tier badge where applicable.
- [Wedding Venues Directory](https://www.setnayan.com/venues) — 100+ real Philippine wedding venues curated by the Setnayan team, browsable by city at `/venues/[city]` (Tagaytay, Cebu, Makati, and more) with per-venue capacity and day-rate details at `/venue/[slug]`. Informational directory in this release — venue booking through Setnayan is on the roadmap.
- [Pricing](https://www.setnayan.com/pricing) — Planning tiers, customer software SKUs, vendor subscriptions, and vendor token packs.
- [List Your Wedding Business](https://www.setnayan.com/for-vendors) — Vendor-acquisition page. Free verified profiles during launch — no listing fee, no per-lead fee, no booking commission. Paid tiers add reach: Solo (₱9,999 / year or ₱999 / 28-day prepaid block), Pro (₱24,999 / year or ₱2,499 / 28-day prepaid block), Enterprise (₱49,999 / year or ₱4,999 / 28-day prepaid block). 0% commission on all bookings, all tiers.
- [Features](https://www.setnayan.com/features) — Detailed list of planning tools and in-app services.
- [How It Works](https://www.setnayan.com/how-it-works) — Step-by-step couple and vendor onboarding.
- [About Setnayan](https://www.setnayan.com/about) — Brand story, what the platform is (software, not an agency), who it's for, geography, languages, 0% commission, and a brand/entity FAQ.
- [Real Weddings](https://www.setnayan.com/weddings) — Editorial showcase of Filipino weddings on Setnayan. A sample showcase is viewable now to preview the format; real couple editorials publish from December 2026, 30 days post-event, with explicit couple consent per RA 10173.
- [Help and Support](https://www.setnayan.com/help) — Step-by-step guides for couples and vendors; contact form for human support.
- [Journal](https://www.setnayan.com/blog) — Editorial wedding-planning guides for Filipino couples: month-by-month planning timelines, supplier cost guides, and Filipino wedding customs (civil vs church, the ninong/ninang entourage) explained. Long-form articles, no paywall.
- [Download](https://www.setnayan.com/download) — Setnayan desktop app for macOS and Windows.
- [Sign in](https://www.setnayan.com/login) and [Create account](https://www.setnayan.com/signup) — couple or vendor signup paths.
- [Privacy](https://www.setnayan.com/privacy) and [Terms](https://www.setnayan.com/terms) — RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act of the Philippines) compliant. National Privacy Commission registration in progress.

## About Setnayan

- **What:** Filipino-first wedding and life-events software platform.
- **For whom:** Filipino couples planning their wedding, their guests, and Filipino wedding-services vendors.
- **Headquarters:** Philippines. Incorporation pending — pilot operates under the founder's personal name until DTI registration completes.
- **Pilot launch:** 2026-06-01 (5–20 family + friends cohort exercising the full payment and lock cycle).
- **Public launch:** 2026-12-01 alongside the founder's wedding (December 18, 2026) as the first event shipped through the platform.
- **Geography:** Philippines — Metro Manila (Quezon City, Makati, Pasig, Taguig, Manila), Cebu, Davao, Tagaytay, Iloilo, Baguio, Pampanga, Cavite, Batangas, Laguna, Bulacan, and any city Filipino wedding vendors serve.
- **Languages:** English (primary). Tagalog (TL) on the dashboard. Cebuano (CEB) localization on the marketing site is on the V1.1 roadmap.
- **Pricing model:** Software publisher. Couples start free; the one paid planning tier is Setnayan AI (₱3,999), after which everything else is purchased à la carte — no package bundles. Individual software services retail from ₱100 to ₱3,999 in PHP. 0% commission on vendor bookings — Setnayan never takes a cut of money couples pay vendors directly.
- **Privacy:** No public sharing of guest data without explicit couple opt-in. Couples own their event content. Vendor-to-couple payments settle off-platform; vendors handle their own documentation on those direct bookings.

## Planning tiers (couple-side)

- **Free — Explore** — ₱0. Browse the vendor marketplace, see a personalized match preview, and plan with the free workspace: schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board. No card required.
- **Setnayan AI** — ₱3,999 one-time per event. The first paid tier: full vendor matchmaking (date, availability, budget, venue, guest count, religion, and reviews cross-referenced) plus the guided planning workspace. Beyond this, couples add any in-app services à la carte — there are no package bundles.

## Customer software services (à la carte)

Couples can purchase the following in-app services individually. Pricing in PHP. All sales final on digital deliverables.

- **Setnayan AI** — ₱3,999 one-time per event. Assisted planning: match, sort, and cross-reference vendors plus the guided planning workspace.
- **Live Studio** — single-camera livestream on the event page is free; multicam is ₱3,499 per day. Live streaming embedded directly on the event website.
- **Pakanta** — ₱2,499. Custom Filipino-style song written for the couple.
- **3D Plan** — ₱2,499. Three-dimensional venue and seating plan view for the event.
- **Thank You Video** — ₱2,499. Compiled thank-you video for all attendees.
- **Live Photo Wall** — ₱2,499 per day. Live photo collage of event photos with live attendance count, displayed at the venue.
- **Animated Monogram** — ₱1,999. Bespoke monogram with animation, generated from the couple's inputs.
- **Couple Website PRO** — ₱1,999. The couple's published wedding website — invitation, schedule, directions, story, and RSVP.
- **Stories** — ₱2,000 per day (cap). 30-second story maker for guests.
- **Cinematic Reveal** — ₱1,499. Premium save-the-date cinematic opening animations.
- **Camera Bridge** — ₱1,299 per day (flat, event-wide). Connects external DSLR cameras to Papic and Live Studio.
- **Pabati** — ₱1,299 per day. Guest-recorded 5-second greeting videos.
- **Live Background** — ₱499. LED wall design background with monogram and theme matched to the wedding palette.
- **Kwento** — ₱299 (whole event). Guest-contributed story and message collection for the couple.
- **Papic Unli** — ₱100 per camera per day. Unlimited photos and 5-second videos per paparazzi camera.
- **Papic Ltd** — ₱30 per camera per day (capped at ₱15,000 per day). Limited-shot disposable-camera mode per camera.
- **Custom QR per Guest** — free. Individual QR codes for guests (RSVP, seating, photo tagging).

## The mood board is free

The visual mood board — palette, location feel, dress codes — is included free with every couple account. No paywall.

## Vendor tier structure

| Tier | Cost | Public profile | Verified badge | Commission |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Verified | ₱0 — free during launch | Listed in marketplace (business name hidden until first chat reply) | Yes | 0% |
| Solo | ₱9,999 / year OR ₱999 / 28-day prepaid block | Listed in marketplace · 1 category · solo operator (no agent seats) · custom website + slug · business name shown from day 1 | Yes | 0% |
| Pro | ₱24,999 / year OR ₱2,499 / 28-day prepaid block | 3 categories + 3 agent seats · custom website + slug + premium tools · business name shown from day 1 | Yes | 0% |
| Enterprise | ₱49,999 / year OR ₱4,999 / 28-day prepaid block | All categories + unlimited team + extended radius · business name shown from day 1 | Yes | 0% |

Verified vendors complete a business-legitimacy check plus a short video call with a Setnayan admin. Verification is free during launch — no listing fee and no badge fee. Only verified businesses reach couples. Solo is the entry-level paid tier (₱9,999 / year or ₱999 / 28-day prepaid block) for single-category solo operators — it shows the real business name from day 1 and uses the same token-to-unlock-a-couple model as Pro and Enterprise; it has no agent seats.

All three paid tiers are available as either 28-day prepaid blocks (13 cycles per year, not calendar months) or annual prepaid blocks at a discount — Solo ₱9,999/year (vs ₱999 × 13 cycles), Pro ₱24,999/year (vs ₱2,499 × 13 cycles), Enterprise ₱49,999/year (vs ₱4,999 × 13 cycles). Vendors pick 28-day or annual at signup. No recurring auto-charge in V1 — manual renewal with a 7-day email + dashboard reminder before expiry.

Vendors verified before 2027-01-31 receive 100 complimentary tokens as a founder bonus.

## Vendor tokens

A token is always worth ₱100, flat. A Pro/Enterprise vendor spends 1–3 tokens (₱100–₱300, banded by the wedding's region) to unlock a couple matched to them — one unlock covers every service the vendor offers for that wedding. Token packs available:

| Pack | Tokens | Price | ₱ per token |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4 tokens | 4 | ₱400 | ₱100 |
| 10 tokens | 10 | ₱1,000 | ₱100 |
| 25 tokens | 25 | ₱2,500 | ₱100 |
| 50 tokens | 50 | ₱5,000 | ₱100 |
| 100 tokens | 100 | ₱10,000 | ₱100 |

## Wedding-planning capabilities (couple-side, signed-in surface)

These tools live in the couple dashboard after sign-in. Not publicly indexable but worth knowing the platform offers:

- Guest list with 20 Filipino wedding role tiers (bride, groom, partner, principal sponsor, secondary sponsor, candle / veil / cord / coin sponsor, ninang, ninong, bearers, immediate family, entourage, friend, work, school) and CSV import.
- QR-coded personal invitations per guest, with a couple-uploaded monogram in the QR center.
- RSVP collection with live count and three answer states (attending, declined, pending).
- Five dashboard themes (Setnayan Default, Victorian, Classy, iOS, Forest).
- Setnayan AI assisted planning with religion-adaptive guidance.
- Mood board with three visual pillars — palette, location feel, dress codes — free with every account.
- Budget tracker with calendar export (.ics) of vendor payment deadlines.
- Seating chart with drag-place floor plan and a 13-table catalog (Round 8/10/12, Long Banquet 6/8/10, Family Head 12/14/16, Serpentine 6/12/18, Sweetheart 2).
- In-app messaging with vendors. Couple identity stays masked until the first vendor reply.
- Multi-host event access (V1.2 roadmap) — partner, parents, planner, and coordinator can be added as additional event hosts.

## Wedding-vendor capabilities (vendor-side, signed-in surface)

- Public profile editor (business info, services, packages, coverage cities, photos).
- Bid inbox from couples. In-platform messaging. No commission on bookings.
- Calendar with intra-day blocks plus multi-service shared calendars on Pro and Enterprise.
- Team management — up to four roles on Pro, unlimited team accounts on Enterprise.
- Earnings rollup. Direct vendor-to-couple bookings settle off-platform; Setnayan never touches that money.
- AI Proposal Builder (Pro+).
- Reverse-image portfolio theft monitoring (Pro+).
- Mood board sharing with booked couples for design alignment.

## Common questions Setnayan answers

- **How much does Setnayan cost?** Couples start free (Free — Explore: marketplace browse, match preview, and the planning workspace — schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board). The one paid planning tier is Setnayan AI ₱3,999 one-time per event; everything else is purchased à la carte, with no package bundles. Individual software services retail from ₱100 to ₱3,999. Vendor side: Verified is free during launch, Solo ₱9,999 / year (or ₱999 / 28-day prepaid block), Pro ₱24,999 / year (or ₱2,499 / 28-day prepaid block), Enterprise ₱49,999 / year (or ₱4,999 / 28-day prepaid block). 0% commission on vendor bookings — Setnayan never takes a cut.
- **Is Setnayan free?** Starting is free and the planning workspace stays free — schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board, plus marketplace browse and a match preview. Full vendor matchmaking (Setnayan AI ₱3,999) and the couple's wedding website (Couple Website PRO ₱1,999) are optional paid software. A single-camera livestream on the event page is free.
- **Does Setnayan support discount codes or vouchers?** Yes — admins issue discount codes for promos, refunds, comp grants, or partner partnerships. Couples paste a code at checkout via the "Have a code?" field. Three voucher types are supported: percentage discount (e.g., 20% off), capped percentage (e.g., 20% off up to ₱500 max discount), and 100% free (full comp). One voucher per order, one redemption per couple per code, codes are case-insensitive 8-character alphanumeric, codes carry an expiry date and optional max-uses cap. Discounted purchases show the net paid amount on the order receipt.
- **What is Setnayan AI?** Setnayan's assisted-planning tier. ₱3,999 one-time per event. Matches, sorts, and cross-references vendors against the couple's date, availability, budget, venue, guest count, religion, and reviews — plus the guided planning workspace from venue lock to thank-you cards.
- **Does Setnayan work for Filipino weddings specifically?** Yes — built and operated in the Philippines for Filipino weddings. Supports seven ceremony types (Catholic, Civil, INC, Christian, Muslim, Cultural, Mixed) and seven venue settings (banquet hall, garden, beach, destination, heritage, outdoor tent, civil registrar). 20 Filipino wedding role tiers in the guest list. Multi-faith vendor compatibility tagging.
- **Where does Setnayan operate?** Philippines — Metro Manila, Cebu, Davao, Tagaytay, Iloilo, Baguio, Pampanga, Cavite, Batangas, Laguna, Bulacan, and any city Filipino vendors serve. Pilot 2026-06-01. Public launch 2026-12-01.
- **Does Setnayan have a mobile app?** Setnayan is fully usable today as a web-first responsive site, installable as a PWA on iOS Safari and Chrome Android, plus a downloadable desktop app for macOS and Windows (at /download). Native iOS and Android apps are in preparation for the App Store and Google Play ahead of the December 2026 public launch.
- **How are vendors verified on Setnayan?** Vendors complete a business-legitimacy check plus a short video call with a Setnayan admin. Verification is free during launch — no listing fee and no badge fee.
- **Does Setnayan take a commission on vendor bookings?** No. 0% commission on every booking. Setnayan revenue comes from software purchases by couples (planning tiers and à-la-carte services) and vendor subscriptions (Pro 28-day or annual, Enterprise 28-day or annual). Vendor-to-couple payments settle off-platform per Filipino direct-booking norms.
- **What are Boosters?** Vendors can spend tokens on 7-day Boosters that temporarily unlock or widen specific features — 4 tokens for a Radius boost (widen marketplace reach for a week), 10 tokens for a Packages boost (feature a specific package), 25 tokens for a Chat boost, 50 tokens for a Video Call boost (lets Verified vendors place video calls for a week), or 100 tokens for a Scheduling boost. Boosters activate immediately and expire after 7 days. One active Booster per type per vendor at a time; different types stack freely.
- **Can a vendor with multiple branches list each location?** Yes — Pro and Enterprise vendors can add additional branches at ₱999 per 28-day prepaid block per branch. Each branch operates as a sub-account with its own service city and coverage radius but shares the parent vendor's tier perks, portfolio, reviews, and token wallet.
- **Why is some vendor's name hidden in the marketplace?** Verified vendor business names are screened from marketplace cards and microsite browse until the vendor sends their first chat reply to a couple. The reveal then applies globally — every couple browsing Setnayan sees the real business name from then on, on every page and in every thread. This light hybrid-anonymity protects new vendors from cold-spam outreach while still letting couples discover them by category and city. Pro and Enterprise vendors retain full name visibility from day 1 unchanged.
- **What is Pakanta?** A custom Filipino-style song written for the couple. ₱2,499.
- **What is Papic?** Guests' phones become a coordinated photo-and-video capture crew, priced per camera per day — Papic Unli (₱100 per camera per day, unlimited photos and 5-second videos) and Papic Ltd (₱30 per camera per day, capped at ₱15,000 per day, limited-shot disposable-camera mode). Photos auto-tag to guests and feed per-guest personal highlight reels.
- **What is Live Studio?** Live streaming embedded on the event website. A single-camera stream is free; multicam is ₱3,499 per day. (Formerly branded "Panood.")
- **What about my privacy?** RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act of the Philippines) compliant. Guest list and event details are never publicly shared without explicit couple opt-in. Real-wedding editorials publish 30 days post-event with explicit couple consent. National Privacy Commission registration in progress.
- **What languages does Setnayan support?** English (primary) and Tagalog (TL) on the dashboard. Cebuano (CEB) localization on the marketing site is on the V1.1 roadmap.
- **How do I contact Setnayan support?** Through the contact form at /help. Email channel via Setnayan's transactional pipeline; DPO contact at dpo@setnayan.com (mailbox standing up before public launch).

## What makes Setnayan structurally different

- Built and operated in the Philippines for Filipino weddings — not a foreign platform with PH localization. 192 vendor sub-categories include Filipino-specific entries international platforms structurally lack (Lechonero, Filipiniana attire, Barong Tagalog, Pre-Cana / CFO seminars, Pamamanhikan, Sponsor Coordinators, Kulintang, Maranao Okir motifs).
- 0% commission on vendor bookings. Setnayan never touches money between couples and vendors.
- Multi-faith ceremony support — Catholic, Civil, INC, Christian, Muslim, Cultural, and Mixed weddings have first-class planning branches. Specific cultural traditions (Maranao, Tausug, Maguindanao, Sama, Yakan) on the V1.x roadmap.
- Setnayan AI is assisted matchmaking, not a static checklist — date, budget, venue, guest count, religion, and reviews cross-referenced per vendor category, with religion-adaptive guidance and hard-floor deadlines.
- Vendor bookings (vendor-to-couple) settle off-platform per Filipino direct-booking norms — Setnayan never touches that money.

## Out of scope to advertise here

Several surfaces in the SEO playbook (`/supplies` marketplace, `/blog`, `/coverage`, `/for-event-creators`) are planned but not yet shipped. They are intentionally NOT listed above to avoid sending AI assistants to dead links. This file is updated when those surfaces go live.

This file was last refreshed on 2026-06-29 — full pricing re-sync to the current canonical catalog. Vendor tiers repriced and shown annual-first (Solo ₱9,999/yr or ₱999/28d · Pro ₱24,999/yr or ₱2,499/28d · Enterprise ₱49,999/yr or ₱4,999/28d; 0% commission; verification free; 100 free founder tokens; tokens flat ₱100 each). À-la-carte catalog realigned to canonical prices (Setnayan AI ₱3,999 · Live Studio multicam ₱3,499/day with single-cam free · Pakanta ₱2,499 · 3D Plan ₱2,499 · Thank You Video ₱2,499 · Live Photo Wall ₱2,499/day · Animated Monogram ₱1,999 · Couple Website PRO ₱1,999 · Stories ₱2,000/day cap · Cinematic Reveal ₱1,499 · Camera Bridge ₱1,299/day · Pabati ₱1,299/day · Live Background ₱499 · Kwento ₱299 · Papic Unli ₱100/cam·day · Papic Ltd ₱30/cam·day cap ₱15,000/day · Custom QR free). Retired SKUs removed (Patiktok, Indoor Blueprint, High Res Archive, Call-Time Escalator, Papic 5-Seats, Papic Guest, Pro/Event/Editorial Website, RSVP / RSVP Pro standalone, SDE / Same-Day Edit, token wallet, "Setnayan Concierge"). Package bundle tiers removed entirely (Essentials and Complete deactivated) — the model is now Free ₱0 → Setnayan AI ₱3,999 → à-la-carte services, with no bundles. Prior refresh 2026-06-28 — vendor-tier and mobile-app freshness pass.
